description: A commentary on poetry, and piyyuṭim, including one by Hayye Gaʾon on the topic of circumcision. F. 1r begins, after a בשמ׳ רחמ׳, ‘A synopsis of some verses of (the poem) את ערובת by Yeḥezqel ha-Kohen “filled with light” (i.e., blind) al-Danūrī b. ʿAlī, in the hand of Efrayim b. ʿAzarya, known as Ibn Faḍlān (?)’. Later references to al-Danūrī in the text indicate he is dead. (Information from CUDL.)
tags: literary with documentary value, efrayim b. 'azaryahu
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
